	<parent>

		<artifactId>snc-app-parent</artifactId>

	</parent>
	<artifactId>sn-dex</artifactId>
	<version>4.2.2-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<name>DEX Application and Device Health</name>
	<description>DEX Application and Device Health</description>
	<packaging>pom</packaging>
	<scm>
		<developerConnection>scm:git:ssh://code.devsnc.com/dev/dex-app.git</developerConnection>
		<tag>master</tag>
	</scm>
	<properties>
		<jenkins.email.recipients>laxmanrao.tallury@servicenow.com</jenkins.email.recipients>
		<plugin.dir>com.sn_dex</plugin.dir>
		<!--i18n config-->
		<i18n-extraction-maven-plugin.version>1.0.55</i18n-extraction-maven-plugin.version>
		<i18n-pseudo-maven-plugin.version>1.0.50</i18n-pseudo-maven-plugin.version>
		<i18n.targetFolderRoot>if</i18n.targetFolderRoot>
		<node.version>v16.20.2</node.version>
		<npm.version>8.11.0</npm.version>
		</properties>
	<repositories>
		<repository>
			<id>stable</id>
			<url>http://nexus.proxy.devsnc.com/content/groups/stable</url>
			<releases>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</releases>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>false</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</repository>
	</repositories>
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<artifactId>maven-clean-plugin</artifactId>
				<configuration>
					<filesets>
						<fileset>
							<directory>node</directory>
						</fileset>
						<fileset>
							<directory>node_modules</directory>
						</fileset>
					</filesets>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
				<artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
				<configuration>
					<nodeVersion>${node.version}</nodeVersion>
					<npmVersion>${npm.version}</npmVersion>
				</configuration>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>install-node-and-npm</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
			  <plugin>
			    <groupId>com.snc.test</groupId>
			    <artifactId>sdlc-maven-plugin</artifactId>
			    <version>2.0.4</version>
			    <configuration>
			      <xunitReportsDirectory>${project.build.directory}/xunit-reports/</xunitReportsDirectory>
			      <utFilenamePattern>unittest-report.xml</utFilenamePattern>
			    </configuration>
			    <executions>
			      <execution>
			        <id>sdlc-annotate</id>
			        <phase>verify</phase>
			        <goals>
			          <goal>annotate</goal>
			        </goals>
			      </execution>
			    </executions>
			  </plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>
</project>",

    "filePath": "/Users/vishalveera.reddy/git/dex-app/docs/adr/0001-glide-app-architecture.md",
    "content": "# ADR-0001: Glide App Architecture

## Status

Accepted

## Context

DEX (Digital Employee Experience) is a ServiceNow application that monitors device health, user experience metrics, and provides remedial actions. The application needs to run within the ServiceNow platform while maintaining testable, modular code.

## Decision

The application follows the ServiceNow Glide app pattern:
- Server-side logic implemented as Script Includes
- Unit tests via NowUnit (Mocha/Chai) with NYC coverage
- Build orchestration through `pom.xml` (Maven wrapper for Jenkins) and `package.json` (npm for local development)
- Deployment via `sn-app-deploy`

## Consequences

- All server-side code must be compatible with the ServiceNow JavaScript engine (Rhino-based)
- Tests run in Node.js but must mock ServiceNow globals (GlideRecord, gs, etc.)
- Jenkins CI uses the Maven wrapper (`pom.xml`) for build orchestration
- Local development uses npm scripts directly",
    "numLines": 24,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 24
  }
}

    "content": "# ADR-0002: Testing Strategy

## Status

Accepted

## Context

The DEX application requires reliable testing to validate Script Include logic before deployment to ServiceNow instances.

## Decision

- Use NowUnit as the test runner (wraps Mocha)
- Use Chai for assertions with plugins (chai-arrays, deep-equal-in-any-order)
- Use Sinon for mocking ServiceNow platform globals
- Use NYC (Istanbul) for code coverage with thresholds enforced in `package.json`
- Use NowUnit data-check plugin for ServiceNow data validation (ACLs, dictionary, XML)

## Consequences

- Coverage thresholds prevent regression: 80% statements, 68% branches, 88% functions, 80% lines
- All tests live in `dex-app/src/test/js/`
- CI build (`npm run ci:build`) runs `npm ci` followed by the full test suite
- Data checks (`npm run datacheck`) validate ServiceNow-specific data integrity",

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
		 xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
	<parent>
		<groupId>com.snc.glide.test</groupId>
		<artifactId>dex-test-parent</artifactId>
		<version>28.0.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
		<relativePath>../dex-test-parent</relativePath>
	</parent>
	<artifactId>dex-metricrule-test</artifactId>
	<name>DEX Metric Rule Test</name>
	<description>Test project for console Tests</description>
	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.snc.glide.test</groupId>
			<artifactId>glide-seismic-test-tools</artifactId>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>commons-beanutils</groupId>
			<artifactId>commons-beanutils</artifactId>
			<version>1.9.4</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.snc.glide.test</groupId>
			<artifactId>dex-test-common</artifactId>
			<version>${version}</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
            <groupId>com.snc</groupId>
            <artifactId>agent-client-collector-visibility-content</artifactId>
            <version>1.4.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>app</classifier>
            <type>zip</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
	</dependencies>
	<profiles>
		<profile>
			<id>sonar</id>
			<activation>
				<property>
					<name>env.nightly_build</name>
					<value>true</value>
				</property>
			</activation>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<plugin>
						<artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
						<configuration>
							<systemPropertyVariables>
								<glide.codecoverage.debugger.enabled>true</glide.codecoverage.debugger.enabled>
							</systemPropertyVariables>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
		<profile>
			<id>it</id>
			<dependencies>
				<dependency>
					<groupId>com.snc</groupId>
					<artifactId>glide-dist</artifactId>
					<classifier>dist</classifier>
					<type>zip</type>
					<scope>test</scope>
				</dependency>
			</dependencies>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>3.5.0</version>
						<executions>
							<execution>
								<id>unpack-clotho</id>
								<phase>validate</phase>
								<goals>
									<goal>unpack</goal>
								</goals>
								<configuration>
									<artifactItems>
										<artifactItem>
											<groupId>com.snc.clotho</groupId>
											<artifactId>clotho-dist</artifactId>
											<version>23.1.0.16</version>
											<classifier>dist</classifier>
											<type>zip</type>
											<overWrite>false</overWrite>
											<outputDirectory>${project.basedir}/clotho-server-config/clotho
											</outputDirectory>
											<destFileName>clotho-dist.zip</destFileName>
										</artifactItem>
									</artifactItems>
									<outputDirectory>${project.basedir}/clotho-server-config/clotho</outputDirectory>
									<overWriteReleases>false</overWriteReleases>
									<overWriteSnapshots>true</overWriteSnapshots>
								</configuration>
							</execution>
						</executions>
					</plugin>
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
						<artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>1.1.1</version>
						<executions>
							<execution>
								<id>start-clotho</id>
								<phase>test</phase>
								<goals>
									<goal>exec</goal>
								</goals>
							</execution>
						</executions>
						<configuration>
							<executable>${project.basedir}/clotho-server-config/startclotho.sh</executable>
							<successCodes>
								<successCode>0</successCode>
								<successCode>1</successCode>
							</successCodes>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
	</profiles>
</project>",
